config.name: microsoft_eventhub_defender_email_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: microsoft_eventhub_defender_email_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Email Activity (6001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:10:12.604246

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    local parts = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #parts ~= 4 then return false end
    for _, part in pairs(parts) do
        if tonumber(part) > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

local function validate_email(email)
    if not email then return false end
    return email:match("^[%w%.%%%+%-]+@[%w%.%-]+%.%a%a+$") ~= nil
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with nested structure
    local output = {
        class_uid = 6001,
        class_name = "Email Activity", 
        category_uid = 6,
        category_name = "Email & Messaging",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 600101,
        email = {},
        network_endpoint = {},
        threat = {},
        authentication = {},
        file = {},
        domain_info = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling
    local timestamp = record.time or record.Timestamp
    output.time = timestamp and tonumber(timestamp) or (os_time() * 1000)

    -- Email metadata
    if record.NetworkMessageId then
        output.email.uid = record.NetworkMessageId
    end

    -- Sender information
    if record.SenderIPv4 and validate_ip(record.SenderIPv4) then
        output.network_endpoint.ipv4 = record.SenderIPv4
    end
    
    if record.SenderIPv6 then
        output.network_endpoint.ipv6 = record.SenderIPv6
    end

    -- Email addresses with validation
    if record.SenderMailFromAddress and validate_email(record.SenderMailFromAddress) then
        output.email.sender_from = record.SenderMailFromAddress
    end

    if record.RecipientEmailAddress and validate_email(record.RecipientEmailAddress) then
        output.email.to = record.RecipientEmailAddress
    end

    -- Threat information
    if record.ThreatNames then
        if type(record.ThreatNames) == "table" then
            output.threat.names = record.ThreatNames
        else
            output.threat.names = {record.ThreatNames}
        end
    end

    -- File attachments
    if record.FileName then
        output.file.name = record.FileName
        output.file.type = record.FileType
        output.file.size = tonumber(record.FileSize) or 0
        output.file.sha256 = record.SHA256
    end

    -- Domain information
    if record.SenderMailFromDomain then
        output.domain_info.sender_domain = record.SenderMailFromDomain
    end

    -- Authentication details
    if record.AuthenticationDetails then
        output.authentication.auth_details = record.AuthenticationDetails
    end

    -- Email direction and actions
    if record.EmailDirection then
        output.email.direction = record.EmailDirection
    end

    if record.EmailAction then
        output.email.action = record.EmailAction
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    -- Remove empty tables
    for k, v in pairs(output) do
        if type(v) == "table" and next(v) == nil then
            output[k] = nil
        end
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
